enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks
- Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks as defined under
clause (ja) of Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (hereinafter collectively referred to
as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Rural Banks as defined under clause (ja) of Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' an

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset
classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as
prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, in addition to these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as prescribed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the
crops raised, as determined by the State Level Bankers' Committee
(SLBC) in each State;
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the crops raised, as determined by

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'doubtful asset' shall mean an asset which has remained in the
substandard category for a period of twelve months;
enriched_requirements.object: has remained in the substandard category for a period of twelve months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Here too, as
in the case of sub-standard assets rescheduling does not entitle a bank
to upgrade the quality of an advance automatically
(3) 'exposure' shall include all funded and non-funded exposures (including
underwriting and similar commitments).
enriched_requirements.object: non-funded exposures (including underwriting and similar commitments)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'long duration crops' shall mean crops with crop season longer than one
year;
enriched_requirements.object: season longer than one year

conditions:
where loss has been identified by a bank
or internal or external auditors or the inspection conducted by NABARD
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'loss asset' shall mean an asset where loss has been identified by a bank
or internal or external auditors or the inspection conducted by NABARD,
but the amount has not been written off wholly or partly by the bank;.
enriched_requirements.object: loss has been identified by a bank or internal or external auditors or the inspection conducted by NABARD, but the amount has not

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) 'non-performing asset' shall mean an asset, including a leased asset,
which has ceased to generate income for a bank;
enriched_requirements.object: a leased asset, which has ceased to generate income for a bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) 'out of order status' - a cash credit / overdraft (CC / OD) account shall be
treated as 'out of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied:
Explanation 1: 'Previous 90 days period' referred to in sub-
paragraph (iii) above shall be inclusive of the day for which the day-
end process is being run.
enriched_requirements.object: of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied: Explanation 1: 'Previous 90 days period' referred to in sub- paragraph

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 2: The definition of 'out of order' shall be applicable to
all credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including
those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail interest
repayments as the only credits.
enriched_requirements.object: credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail inte

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) 'overdue' status - any amount due to a bank under any credit facility shall
be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank
provisioning to gross non-performing assets and indicates the extent of funds kept aside to cover loan losses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) 'security' shall mean tangible security properly charged to the bank and
will not include intangible securities like guarantees (including State
government guarantees), comfort letters, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: charged to the bank and will not include intangible securities like guarantees (including State government guarantees)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(11) 'short duration crops' shall mean crops which are not "long duration"
crops;
enriched_requirements.object: not "long duration" crops

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(12) 'substandard asset' shall mean an asset, which has remained NPA for a
period less than or equal to twelve months;
enriched_requirements.object: has remained NPA for a period less than or equal to twelve months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The definitions of the terms 'Micro Enterprises', 'Small Enterprises', and 'Medium
Enterprises' shall be in terms of the circular FIDD.MSME &
NFS.BC.No.3/06.02.31/2020-21 dated July 2, 2020 on 'Credit flow to Micro,
Small and Medium Enterprises Sector' as updated from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: the circular FIDD

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Companies Act, 2013, or any statutory
modification or re-enactment thereto or other regulations issued by the Reserve
Bank or the Glossary of Terms published by the Reserve Bank or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Companies Ac

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans
sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021:
(1) The exact due dates for repayment of a loan, frequency of repayment,
breakup between principal and interest, examples of dates of
classification as special mention account (SMA) / non-performing asset
(NPA), etc.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021: (1) The exact due dates for repayment of a lo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: shall be clearly specified in the loan agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: the loan agreement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The borrower shall be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction
and also at the time of subsequent changes, if any, to the sanction
terms/loan agreement till full repayment of the loan.
enriched_requirements.object: same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In cases of loan facilities with moratorium on payment of principal and /
or interest, the exact date of commencement of repayment shall also be
specified in the loan agreements.
enriched_requirements.object: the loan agreements

conditions: In case of loans sanctioned before December 31
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loans sanctioned before December 31, 2021, compliance to the
instructions in paragraph 8 shall be ensured as and when such loans become
due for renewal/review.
enriched_requirements.object: when such loans become due for renewal/review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall apply the following principles in respect of working capital accounts
sanctioned by them:
(1) Ensure that drawings in the working capital accounts are covered by the
adequacy of current assets;
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of working capital accounts sanctioned by them: (1) Ensure that drawings in the working capital accounts are

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Stock statements relied upon by the bank for determining drawing power
should not be older than three months;
enriched_requirements.object: months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The outstanding in the account based on drawing power calculated from
stock statements older than three months, shall be deemed as irregular.

Regular and ad hoc credit limits shall be reviewed / regularised not later than
three months from the due date / date of ad hoc sanction.
enriched_requirements.object: not later than three months from the due date / date of ad hoc sanction

conditions:
In case of constraints such as non-availability of financial statements and other
data from the borrowers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of constraints such as non-availability of financial statements and other
data from the borrowers, a bank should furnish evidence to show that renewal /
review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon.
enriched_requirements.object: that renewal / review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon

enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 180 days from the due
date
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Hence, an account where the regular/adhoc
credit limits have not been reviewed / renewed within 180 days from the due
date/date of ad hoc sanction should be treated as NPA.

conditions:
If the debits arising out of devolvement of letters of credit or invoked guarantees
are parked in a separate account
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the debits arising out of devolvement of letters of credit or invoked guarantees
are parked in a separate account, the balance outstanding in that account also
should be treated as a part of the borrower's principal operating account for the
purpose of application of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: part of the borrower's principal operating account for the purpose of application of these Directions

conditions:
if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall flag a borrower account as overdue, if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date, irrespective of the time of running such processes.
enriched_requirements.object: as overdue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, classification of borrower accounts as SMA as well as NPA shall be
done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA
classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end process is
run.
enriched_requirements.object: of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Thus, the date of SMA / NPA shall reflect the asset classification status of an
account at the day-end of that calendar date.
enriched_requirements.object: status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date

conditions: If due date of a loan account is March 31
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Illustration I:
If due date of a loan account is March 31, 2021, and full dues are
not received before the bank runs the day-end process for this date, the date of
overdue shall be March 31, 2021.

conditions: If it continues to remain overdue
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If it continues to remain overdue, then this
account shall get tagged as SMA-1 upon running day-end process on April 30,
2021 i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: upon running day-end process on April 30, 2021 i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly,
the date of SMA-1 classification for that account shall be April 30, 2021.

conditions: if the account continues to remain overdue

if continues to remain
overdue further
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, if the account continues to remain overdue, it shall get tagged as SMA-
2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain
overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon running day-end process on
June 29, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: 2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon runn

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall establish appropriate internal systems to eliminate the tendency to
delay or postpone the identification of NPAs, especially in respect of high value
accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: to eliminate the tendency to delay or postpone the identification of NPAs, especially in respect of high value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall fix a minimum cut-off point to decide what would
constitute a high value account depending upon their respective business levels.
enriched_requirements.object: point to decide what would constitute a high value account depending upon their respective business levels

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The cut-off point should be valid for the entire accounting year.
enriched_requirements.object: entire accounting year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The system should ensure that doubts in asset classification due to any reason
are settled through specified internal channels within one month from the date on
which the account would have been classified as NPA as per extant guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: asset classification due to any reason are settled through specified internal channels within one month from the date on which t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Responsibility and validation levels for ensuring proper asset classification shall
be fixed by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall implement the following instructions to increasing awareness among
the borrowers:
(1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining with
examples, the concepts of date of overdue, special mention account and
non-performing asset classification and upgradation, with specific
reference to day-end process;
enriched_requirements.object: to increasing awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) consider displaying such consumer education literature in its branches
by means of posters and / or other appropriate media;
enriched_requirements.object: or other appropriate media

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make suitable disclosures in its Notes to Accounts as per the
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks -
Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: its Notes to Accounts as per the requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Financial St

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a NPA, as the
case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: an advance as a standard asset or a NPA, as the case may be

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as NPA if any of the following
conditions are satisfied:
(1) interest and / or instalment of principal remain overdue for a period of
more than 90 days in respect of a term loan;
enriched_requirements.object: an advance as NPA if any of the following conditions are satisfied: (1) interest and / or instalment of principal remain overdue fo
borrower's financial position is satisfactory

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The asset classification norms specified at sub-paragraphs 24(5) and 24(6) shall
be applicable only to the following agricultural advances:
(1) Loans to individual farmers [including Self Help Groups (SHGs) or Joint
Liability Groups (JLGs), i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: the following agricultural advances: (1) Loans to individual farmers [including Self Help Groups (SHGs) or Joint Liability Group

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) crop loans to farmers, which shall include traditional / non-
traditional plantations, and horticulture;
enriched_requirements.object: traditional plantations, and horticulture

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) crop loans to farmers which shall include traditional / non-traditional
plantations and horticulture;
enriched_requirements.object: plantations and horticulture

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that while granting agricultural loans and advances, realistic
repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / fluidity with the
borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: agricultural loans and advances, realistic repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / fluidity with the bor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Asset classification shall be borrower-wise and not facility-wise.
enriched_requirements.object: facility-wise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the facilities
granted by a bank to a borrower and investment in all the securities issued by the
borrower shall have to be treated as NPA / Non-Performing Investment (NPI) and
not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular.
enriched_requirements.object: as NPA / Non-Performing Investment (NPI) and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The availability of security or net worth of borrower / guarantor should not be
taken into account for the purpose of treating an advance as NPA or otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: for the purpose of treating an advance as NPA or otherwise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The asset classification of borrowal accounts where a solitary or a few credits are
recorded before the balance sheet date should be handled with care and without
scope for subjectivity.
enriched_requirements.object: and without scope for subjectivity

conditions:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the
basis of the data available
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the
basis of the data available, the account should be deemed as a NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In other
genuine cases, the bank shall furnish satisfactory evidence to the Statutory
Auditors / Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account
to eliminate doubts on their performing status.
enriched_requirements.object: the Statutory Auditors / Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account to eliminate doubts on

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit facilities backed by guarantee of the Central Government though
overdue shall be treated as NPA only when the Government repudiates its
guarantee when invoked.
enriched_requirements.object: only when the Government repudiates its guarantee when invoked

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
State Government guaranteed advances and investments in State Government
guaranteed securities shall attract asset classification and provisioning norms if
interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue
for more than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue for more than 9

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Asset classification of accounts under consortium shall be based on the record
of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a bearing on the
recoverability of the advances.
enriched_requirements.object: record of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a bearing on the recoverability of the advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank participating in
the consortium shall, therefore, arrange to get its share of recovery transferred
from the lead bank or get an express consent from the lead bank for the transfer
of its share of recovery, to ensure proper asset classification in its books.
enriched_requirements.object: get its share of recovery transferred from the lead bank or get an express consent from the lead bank for the transfer of its

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: are classified as 'Standard' may be retained as such upon implementation.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Borrower accounts which may have slipped into NPA between the date of
occurrence of the calamity and implementation of the resolution plan, shall be
upgraded as 'Standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation of the resolution plan

conditions: Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan, the subsequent asset
classification shall be governed by the criteria laid out in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: criteria laid out in these Directions

conditions:
where a subsequent restructuring is
necessitated under the provisions of Chapter IV-A of the aforesaid Directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accounts which are restructured under paragraph 32J to 32R of the Reserve
Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions,
2025 dated November 28, 2025, where a subsequent restructuring is
necessitated under the provisions of Chapter IV-A of the aforesaid Directions,
shall continue to be classified as 'Standard'.]
C.
enriched_requirements.object: as 'Standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The current assets and their valuation shall be looked into at the time of Statutory
Audit / Concurrent audit.
enriched_requirements.object: the time of Statutory Audit / Concurrent audit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To bring down divergence arising out of difference in assessment of the value of
security the following shall apply in cases of NPAs with balance of ₹15 lakh and
above:
(1) To enhance the reliability on stock valuations, stock audit at annual
intervals by external agencies may be considered in case of larger
advances.
enriched_requirements.object: NPAs with balance of ₹15 lakh and above: (1) To enhance the reliability on stock valuations, stock audit at annual intervals by exte

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Collaterals such as immovable properties charged in favour of the bank
should be valued once in three years by valuers appointed as per the
guidelines approved by the Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: three years by valuers appointed as per the guidelines approved by the Board of Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify non-performing assets further into 'substandard assets',
'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: into 'substandard assets', 'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories, as the case may be

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NPA classified as substandard asset shall have well defined credit
weaknesses that jeopardise the liquidation of the debt and are characterised by
the distinct possibility that the bank will sustain some loss, if deficiencies are not
corrected.
enriched_requirements.object: weaknesses that jeopardise the liquidation of the debt and are characterised by the distinct possibility that the bank will sustain some loss

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An asset where the terms of the loan agreement regarding interest and
principal have been renegotiated or rescheduled after commencement of
production, should be classified as sub-standard and should remain in such
category for at least two years of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated
or rescheduled terms.
enriched_requirements.object: and should remain in such category for at least two years of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated or reschedu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In other words, the classification of an asset should not be
upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling, unless there is satisfactory
compliance of the above condition.
enriched_requirements.object: a result of rescheduling

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NPA classified as loss asset is considered uncollectible and of such little value
that its continuance as a bankable asset is not warranted although there may be
some salvage or recovery value.
enriched_requirements.object: recovery value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An asset need not go through the various stages of classification in case of
serious credit impairment and such assets should be straightaway classified as
a doubtful / loss asset as appropriate.
enriched_requirements.object: a doubtful / loss asset as appropriate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Erosion in the value of security shall be
reckoned as significant when the realisable value of security is less than 50 per
cent of the value assessed by the bank or accepted by NABARD at the time of
last inspection, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: when the realisable value of security is less than 50 per cent of the value assessed by the bank or accepted by NABARD at t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such NPAs shall be straightaway classified
under 'doubtful category' and provisioning should be made as applicable to
'doubtful assets'.
enriched_requirements.object: 'doubtful category' and provisioning should be made as applicable to 'doubtful assets'

conditions: if the realisable value of the security
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, if the realisable value of the security, as assessed by
the bank /approved valuers / RBI / NABARD is less than 10 per cent of the
outstandings in the borrowal accounts, the existence of security should be
ignored and the asset should be straightaway classified as loss asset.
enriched_requirements.object: asset should be straightaway classified as loss asset

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be
either written off or fully provided for by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: or fully provided for by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The loan accounts classified as NPAs may be upgraded as 'standard' asset only
if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower

conditions: In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility from a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility from a bank, loan
accounts shall be upgraded from NPA to standard asset category only upon
repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit
facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With regard to upgradation of accounts classified as NPA due to restructuring,
the instructions as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks
- Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 shall be applicable.

Coverage of automation:
(1) All borrowal accounts, including temporary overdrafts, irrespective of
size, sector or types of limits, shall be covered in the automated
Information Technology (IT) based system ('System') for asset
classification, upgradation, and provisioning processes.
enriched_requirements.object: automated Information Technology (IT) based system ('System') for asset classification, upgradation, and provisioning processes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank's
investments shall also be covered under the System.
enriched_requirements.object: the System

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Asset classification rules shall be configured in the System, in compliance
with the regulatory stipulations.
enriched_requirements.object: System, in compliance with the regulatory stipulations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Calculation of provisioning requirement shall also be System based as
per pre-set rules for various categories of assets, value of security as
captured in the System and any other regulatory stipulations issued from
time to time on provisioning requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: as per pre-set rules for various categories of assets, value of security as captured in the System and any other regulatory stipu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In addition, income recognition / derecognition in case of impaired assets
(NPAs / NPIs) shall be system driven and amount required to be reversed
from the income account should be obtained from the System without
any manual intervention.
enriched_requirements.object: amount required to be reversed from the income account should be obtained from the System without any manual intervention

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The System shall handle both down-grade and upgrade of accounts
through Straight Through Process (STP) without manual intervention.
enriched_requirements.object: upgrade of accounts through Straight Through Process (STP) without manual intervention

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The System based asset classification shall be an ongoing exercise for both
down-gradation and up-gradation of accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: for both down-gradation and up-gradation of accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that the asset
classification status is updated as part of day end process.
enriched_requirements.object: classification status is updated as part of day end process

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank should also
be able to generate classification status report at any given point of time with
actual date of classification of assets as NPAs / NPIs.
enriched_requirements.object: generate classification status report at any given point of time with actual date of classification of assets as NPAs / NPIs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Exceptions to automation: Exceptions may be granted from System driven
classification in certain circumstances, which are expected to be minimum and
temporary.
enriched_requirements.object: driven classification in certain circumstances, which are expected to be minimum and temporary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These exceptions shall be from automated classification and not from
income recognition, asset classification and provisioning norms under these
Directions and shall be subject to the conditions specified below.
enriched_requirements.object: and not from income recognition, asset classification and provisioning norms under these Directions and shall be subj

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) A bank shall not resort to manual intervention / over-ride in the System
based asset classification process.
enriched_requirements.object: / over-ride in the System based asset classification process

conditions:
where manual intervention is required
to override the System classification
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In any exceptional circumstance where manual intervention is required
to override the System classification, it must have at least two level
authorisation.
enriched_requirements.object: classification, it must have at least two level authorisation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such delegation of powers for authorising the exceptions
should be as per the Board approved policy of the bank and preferably
should be done from the centralised location and suitably documented.
enriched_requirements.object: Board approved policy of the bank and preferably should be done from the centralised location and suitably documented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, any such intervention shall have appropriate audit trails and
subjected to audit by concurrent and statutory auditors.
enriched_requirements.object: and subjected to audit by concurrent and statutory auditors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Detailed reports
of such manual intervention shall be placed before the Audit Committee
regularly.
enriched_requirements.object: Audit Committee regularly

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) A bank shall maintain logs for all exceptions i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: exceptions i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These logs shall also
be stored for a minimum period of three years and not be tampered with
during the storage period.
enriched_requirements.object: a minimum period of three years and not be tampered with during the storage period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These logs shall be system generated.

System Requirements and System Audit:
(1) In case a separate application outside the Core Banking Solution (CBS)
is used as the System for NPA / NPI identification and / or classification,
the System must have access to the required data from the CBS and / or
other relevant applications of the bank and the borrower / investment
accounts shall be updated back into the CBS automatically, wherever
applicable, through STP.
enriched_requirements.object: the CBS automatically

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank shall keep the business logic and other parameters /
configurations of the System updated to ensure that the System based
identification, classification, provisioning and income recognition are
strictly in compliance with the regulatory guidelines on an ongoing basis.
enriched_requirements.object: and other parameters / configurations of the System updated to ensure that the System based identification, classification, pr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) There should be periodic system audit, at least once in a year, by Internal
/ External Auditors who are well versed with the system audit both on
system parameters as also from the perspective of compliance to Income
Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning norms as per these
Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: at least once in a year, by Internal / External Auditors who are well versed with the system audit both on system parameters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall adhere to the following baseline requirements while designing and
maintaining the NPA classification System:
(1) Data Input
enriched_requirements.object: baseline requirements while designing and maintaining the NPA classification System: (1) Data Input

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Data Input in the System by any means should be fully captured
and stored without truncation (For example: time stamp - with date
and time, narration field, or any other text data captured).
enriched_requirements.object: stored without truncation (For example: time stamp - with date and time, narration field, or any other text data captured)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such validations,
among other things should check for data type validations, min/max
value, exceptions, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: validations, min/max value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) Data input shall be effected only after authentication and
authorisation.
enriched_requirements.object: authentication and authorisation

conditions: If there are any generic user-IDs used
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If there are any generic user-IDs used, it should only be used under
exceptional circumstances and such ids should be mandatorily
mapped to the employee ID of the user to fix accountability of the
activities carried-out under the generic ID.
enriched_requirements.object: exceptional circumstances and such ids should be mandatorily mapped to the employee ID of the user to fix accountability of the act

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall also include transactions
/ activities carried out by administrator accounts in the System.
enriched_requirements.object: activities carried out by administrator accounts in the System

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
shall have
at least two individuals to complete the activity).
enriched_requirements.object: individuals to complete the activity)

conditions:
in case of advances) and all the instruments of an entity
(where bank has made investments in an entity)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such STP mechanism
shall seamlessly take into account all the facilities availed by a given
customer (in case of advances) and all the instruments of an entity
(where bank has made investments in an entity), maintained across
multiple systems of the bank without any manual intervention.
enriched_requirements.object: all the facilities availed by a given customer (in case of advances) and all the instruments of an entity (where bank has

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a
bank shall also ensure that the updated account status, including asset
classification of the customer accounts, flow to the CBS automatically, if
NPA classification process is performed outside CBS.
enriched_requirements.object: updated account status, including asset classification of the customer accounts, flow to the CBS automatically

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Any changes to the data, parameters from backend shall be
avoided.

The System should provide for changes to the data items
only through front end (from the application (For example: CBS)
itself and not through the back-end database update) after requisite
authorisation.
enriched_requirements.object: the data items only through front end (from the application (For example: CBS) itself and not through the back-end database upd

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Audit trails / logs of access, changes to any data,
parameters, if any, should be captured with specific user details in
the system.
enriched_requirements.object: user details in the system

conditions: In case of exceptions in rare circumstances
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) In case of exceptions in rare circumstances, such changes should
be duly approved at an appropriate level and documented.
enriched_requirements.object: an appropriate level and documented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provision for Management Information System (MIS) report should
be available to auditors to generate complete list of back-end
access and changes made.
enriched_requirements.object: to generate complete list of back-end access and changes made

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Provisions of audit trails / logs to capture details of mandatory fields
(that are essential to complete the transaction and essential to
identify the transaction for audit / forensic purpose in the future) of
all the transactions (financial and non-financial) shall be made.
(ii) Logs should be maintained for changing the master data.
enriched_requirements.object: the master data

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
System
generated activity logs of the users with administrative privileges
should also be maintained.

(6) System Generated NPAs: All parameters required for NPA / NPI
identification shall be captured in the CBS or associated sub-system(s) /
module(s) meant for NPA / NPI identification / classification of asset
codes as per these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: CBS or associated sub-system(s) / module(s) meant for NPA / NPI identification / classification of asset codes as per these Directi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It should provide for separate MIS report
capturing all parameters for NPA / NPI identification.
enriched_requirements.object: report capturing all parameters for NPA / NPI identification

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) Test Environment: The existing test environment in the bank with dummy
data and functional logic similar to that of the product environment of the
System shall be made available to the supervisors during their onsite
supervisory visit(s) as per the requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: the supervisors during their onsite supervisory visit(s) as per the requirements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be required, inter
alia, to perform sample transactions review to assess whether the
solution adheres in complying with regulatory prescriptions in the extant
environment for NPA / NPI identification as per applicability.
enriched_requirements.object: to perform sample transactions review to assess whether the solution adheres in complying with regulatory prescriptions in th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall draw up their standard operating procedure (SOP) for System based
NPA classification for usage by the operating staff.
enriched_requirements.object: operating procedure (SOP) for System based NPA classification for usage by the operating staff

conditions: in case of non-compliance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The adherence to these instructions will be examined as part of supervisory
assessment of a bank and in case of non-compliance, suitable enforcement
action shall be initiated against the concerned bank.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make provisions of 0.25 per cent in respect of direct advances to
agricultural and SME sectors in the standard category and 1.00 per cent in
respect of advances to the Commercial Real Estate (CRE) Sector classified as
'standard asset'.
0.40 per cent of the funded outstanding on a portfolio basis shall be made.

A general provision of 10 per cent of total outstanding shall be made in respect
of all other loans and advances in the sub-standard category.
enriched_requirements.object: of all other loans and advances in the sub-standard category

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions in respect of doubtful assets shall be as follows:
(1) 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the
realisable value of the tangible security to which the bank has a valid
recourse and the realisable value is estimated on a realistic basis.
enriched_requirements.object: 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the realisable value of the tangible security to which the bank h

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) above, depending upon the period for which
the asset has remained doubtful, 20 per cent - 50 per cent of the secured
portion (i.e., estimated realisable value of the outstandings) on the
following basis:
Period for which the advance has been considered as doubtful
Provision requirements
(in per cent) Up to one year 20 One to three years 30 More than three years 100
Illustration I:
The outstanding amount as on March 31, 2017: ₹10,000
Realisable value of security: ₹8,000
Period for which the advance has remained in 'doubtful' category as on
March 31, 2007: 2.5 years
Provisioning requirement:
As on Asset Classif
Provisions on secured
Provisions on unsecured portion
Total
(₹) per cent Amount
portion
ication
per cent Amount
(₹) March 31, 2017
(₹)
Doubtf ul 1-3 years
30 2400 100 2000 4400
March 31, 2018
Doubtf ul > 3 years
100 8000 100 2000 10000
(3) In case of the advances guaranteed by Deposit Insurance and Credit
Guarantee Corporation (DICGC) / Export Credit Guarantee Corporation
(ECGC), provision shall be made only after the realisable value of
securities is deducted from the outstanding balance.
enriched_requirements.object: the realisable value of securities is deducted from the outstanding balance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In the case of loss assets, the entire assets should be written off.

conditions:
If the assets are
permitted to remain in the books for any reason
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the assets are
permitted to remain in the books for any reason, 100 per cent of the outstandings
should be provided for.

conditions: Where provisions are required to be made as per this paragraphs 54 to 59
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where provisions are required to be made as per this paragraphs 54 to 59, the
amounts held in Interest Suspense Account shall not be reckoned as part of
provisions.
enriched_requirements.object: of provisions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Amounts lying in the Interest Suspense Account shall be deducted
from the relative advances and provisioning as per the norms should be made on
the balances after such deductions.
enriched_requirements.object: relative advances and provisioning as per the norms should be made on the balances after such deductions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make an additional specific provision of five percent of the
outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been
implemented in terms of Chapter IV-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Regional
Rural Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: provision of five percent of the outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been implemented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
specific provisions shall be over and above the applicable prudential provisions
subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For accounts where repeated restructuring is necessitated in terms of Chapter
IV-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, a bank shall make additional specific
provisioning of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of
restructuring made under the aforesaid Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of restructuring made under the aforesaid Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This additional specific
provisioning shall be over and above the applicable prudential provisions
subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional specific provisions maintained in terms of paragraph 60A and
60B above may be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the
outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into NPA post implementation
of the restructuring, and without being subjected to another restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into NPA post implementation of the rest

conditions: In case the borrower defaults during the above period
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the borrower defaults during the above period, the conditions for
reversal of additional specific provision, mentioned above, shall be tested from
the date of rectification of default.]
enriched_requirements.object: date of rectification of default

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may recognise income on accrual basis only in respect of credit facilities
which are classified as 'standard'.
enriched_requirements.object: basis only in respect of credit facilities which are classified as 'standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For credit facilities which are not classified as 'standard', including those
guaranteed by Government, income shall be recognized on actual receipt basis
i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: receipt basis i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Once an account is classified as NPA, the entire interest accrued and credited to
income account in the past periods, must be reversed to the extent it remains
unrealised.
enriched_requirements.object: extent it remains unrealised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank should not take to the Income account interest on non-performing assets.
enriched_requirements.object: account interest on non-performing assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In other words, it should not be
construed in any manner as waiver of interest due from the borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: manner as waiver of interest due from the borrowers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding paragraph 64, interest on advances against Term Deposits,
NSCs, KVPs and life insurance policies may be taken to income account on the
due date, provided adequate margin is available in the accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: account on the due date

conditions: where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases of loans where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest,
income may be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be
classified as 'standard'.
enriched_requirements.object: basis for accounts which continue to be classified as 'standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be evaluated against the definition of
'restructuring' provided in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: definition of 'restructuring' provided in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Di

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the absence of a clear agreement between the bank and the borrower for the
purpose, the bank should adopt an accounting principle and exercise the right of
appropriation of recoveries in a uniform and consistent manner.
enriched_requirements.object: and exercise the right of appropriation of recoveries in a uniform and consistent manner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest income recognition in respect of borrower accounts where resolution
plan has been implemented in terms of Chapter IV-A of the Reserve Bank of
India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025
dated November 28, 2025, shall be on accrual basis.

For accounts specified at paragraph 36B of these Directions, interest income
shall be recognized on cash basis.]
4 Inserted with effect from July 1, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the directions,
instructions, and guidelines listed in the above notification shall continue to
remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall
be final and binding.
